bullets.text: U.S.-Israel strikes on Iran raise risk of prolonged conflict and regime uncertainty, increasing geopolitical tail risks across Middle East security and alliances.
Oil spikes on feared Iranian supply disruption; crude jumped >8% to above $72, signaling renewed inflation and growth risks for importers.
Strait of Hormuz becomes key market chokepoint; any sustained closure could trigger $100 oil and a 1970s-style energy shock.
Markets brace for higher volatility: Iran escalation plus a critical U.S. jobs report could shift rate expectations and risk appetite.
Defense stocks expected to benefit from strikes; longer-term cash flows depend on sustained procurement, replenishment, and higher baseline defense budgets.
Prediction-market trading tied to Iran strikes drew insider-trading allegations; scrutiny could accelerate regulation of event contracts and crypto-based wagering venues.
Anthropic’s Defense Department talks reportedly collapsed, underscoring governance, security, and ethics frictions shaping federal AI procurement and vendor selection.
OpenAI disclosed more details on its Pentagon agreement, signaling expanding defense-AI commercialization and intensifying competition over compliance, safety, and access.
Anthropic’s Claude topping app-store charts amid backlash against ChatGPT suggests rapid consumer switching and heightened platform risk from trust, policy, and product changes.
Nigeria’s Dangote refinery ramps domestic processing ambitions, potentially reshaping regional fuel imports, FX pressures, and West African energy security if operationally stable.
New estimates on climate-change economic costs strengthen the case for mitigation and adaptation spending, with implications for insurance, infrastructure, and fiscal planning.
AI mapping of Alzheimer’s brains reveals chemical changes beyond amyloid plaques, potentially improving diagnostics and broadening therapeutic targets for neurodegenerative disease.
A faint cosmic background ‘hum’ could help resolve the Hubble-tension expansion-rate dispute, influencing cosmology models and constraints on dark energy or new physics.
